title: aizoon zeyheri
intro: Aizoon zeyheri, also known as Zeyher's carpetweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Aizoon zeyheri is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
